channel.title: Media & Contact on Al-Qadisiyah University
channel.description: Recent content in Media & Contact on Al-Qadisiyah University

item.title: Contact Us
item.description:
Contact Information

Address

Al-Qadisiyah University
Al-Diwaniyah, Al-Qadisiyah Province
Iraq

Phone

  • Main Line: +964 780 000 0000
  • Fax: +964 36 224 1400

Email

  • General Inquiries: info@qu.edu.iq
  • Admissions: admission@qu.edu.iq
  • Student Affairs: students@qu.edu.iq
  • Technical Support: support@qu.edu.iq

Working Hours

  • Sunday - Thursday: 8:00 AM - 3:00 PM
  • Friday & Saturday: Closed

Contact Form

To contact us, please fill out the form below and we will respond as soon as possible.

The contact form is not currently enabled. Please email us directly at: info@qu.edu.iq

item.title: Multimedia
item.description:
Photo & Video Gallery

Photo Albums

Graduation Ceremony 2024

Photos from the 35th batch graduation ceremony.

International Scientific Conference

Documentation of the 12th international conference events.

Campus Tour

Photos of modern university buildings and facilities.

Student Activities

Sports, cultural, and artistic activities snapshots.

Videos

University Introduction

Comprehensive overview of Al-Qadisiyah University.

Virtual Tour

Virtually explore the university campus.

Alumni Testimonials

Graduates sharing their university experience.

Research Achievements

Video reports on major scientific achievements.

item.title: Photo Gallery
item.description:
Al-Qadisiyah University Photo Gallery

Explore the university campus and facilities through our photo gallery.

University Buildings

Main Gate

Photo of Al-Qadisiyah University’s main gate welcoming visitors and students.

Administrative Building

Main building housing university administration and presidency.

Central Library

Central library containing thousands of books and scientific references.

Scientific Laboratories

College of Medicine Labs

Modern laboratories equipped for medical student training.

College of Engineering Labs

Advanced engineering workshops and laboratories.
